---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for envx
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case, not just the
solution you have in mind.

## Proposed solution

How you would like envx to behave. A sample command line or config snippet
helps a lot.

```sh
envx ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — links to prior art in other tools, related issues, etc.
